title: Hot Dog Madness!
description: The mod with weird ideas about hot dogs.
body:
- A crazy mod about hot dogs
**Featuring...**
- Hot Dogs
- Hot Dog Blocks
- Raw Hotdogs
- Cheese
- Cooked Hot-Dog With No Bun
- Hot Dog Bun
- The 10-Damage Pork-Chopper, "Infused with Oinks!"
